description_long: This is a black baseball cap with a structured, rounded crown and a slightly curved brim. The front of the cap features a prominent red circular logo with a stylized white 'Z' or similar character inside. The back of the cap has an open arch, typical of adjustable baseball caps, though the adjustment mechanism is not visible. The cap appears to be made from a smooth, matte fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with reinforced stitching along the seams. The overall design is minimalistic, with the logo being the only decorative element. The cap is suitable for casual urban wear and provides shade and style for the wearer.
description: A black baseball cap with a red circular logo on the front and a rounded crown, featuring a curved brim and an open back arch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red circular logo with a white symbol on the crown and the curved brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, unadorned black fabric and the profile of the curved brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open arch at the back of the cap, typical of adjustable baseball caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous black fabric and the edge of the red logo on the front.
